Heritage World Coin Auctions - Showcase Auction 61557, Lot 25015 — Ancients
Justinian I the Great (AD 527-565). AE follis or 40 nummi (34mm, 5h). NGC Choice Fine. Constantinople, 4th officina, Regnal Year 31 (AD 557/8). D N IVSTINI-ANVS PP AVG, pearl-diademed, helmet
sales.description:
Ancients
Justinian I the Great (AD 527-565). AE follis or 40 nummi (34mm, 5h). NGC Choice Fine. Constantinople, 4th officina, Regnal Year 31 (AD 557/8). D N IVSTINI-ANVS PP AVG, pearl-diademed, helmeted, and cuirassed bust of Justinian I facing, wearing pendilia, with globus cruciger in right hand, shield decorated with horseman motif in left; cross in right field / Large M (mark of value); A/N/N/O to left, X/III (date) to right, cross above, Δ (officina) below; CON in exergue. Sear 163.

From...
